title: Here is why Delhi High Court recalled its order granting relief to Siddharth Varadarajan in OCI card case
description: The Delhi High Court on Thursday recalled its earlier order by which it had quashed the Central government decision to reject The Wire founding editor Siddharth Varadarajan's application for an Overseas Citizen of India (OCI) card.Varadarajan has sought conversion of his Person of Indian Origin (PIO) status to OCI since the PIO scheme no longer exists and has been merged with OCI. Justice Purushaindra Kumar Kaurav had on May 12 ruled that that the Central government communication dated April 2,
